assertions.text: Review covers all 7 required sections: Clarity, Accuracy, SEO, Readability, Front matter consistency, Accessibility, and Suggestions
Front matter section checks both title and excerpt fields for existence and accuracy
Front matter section flags the title as 61+ characters with a soft warning
WCAG section notes the Eleventy h1 convention and checks heading hierarchy starting at h2
SEO section checks every <a> tag for meaningful link text and rel=noopener noreferrer
Readability uses judgment rather than a mechanical word-count cutoff
